positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a friendly celestial fox companion sitting on a crescent moon, surrounded by floating constellations and bioluminescent nebula clouds. The style should be vibrant, modern, and highly graphic, reminiscent of detailed linework combined with watercolor gradients. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette dominated by deep indigo, sapphire blue, cosmic purples, and pops of electric teal and gold foil accents. The composition must be symmetrical and centered, suitable for an apparel print. The linework should be strong and clean, ensuring the entire image reads well as a single decorative emblem. Minimal background clutter, focusing on the subject's outline and the magical, celestial elements. High detail, clean edges, perfect for printing.
negative: blurry, out of focus, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, grainy, low quality, multiple subjects, deformed, bad anatomy, cropped, noisy, messy details
